title: Vibrant Plastic Yo-Yo Favors - Assorted Colors & Fun Party Goodie Bag Fillers - Perfect for Kids & Adults - 4ct
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: ASSORTED COLORFUL DESIGNS: Add a splash of color to any event with our vibrant plastic yo-yo favors, available in a variety of bright and eye-catching colors, perfect for matching party themes and appealing to all ages.

DURABLE PLASTIC MATERIAL: Crafted from high-quality plastic material, these yo-yos are built to last through endless hours of fun and entertainment, ensuring your guests enjoy them long after the party is over.

PERFECT FOR KIDS & ADULTS: These versatile yo-yos are ideal for all ages, offering a classic and nostalgic party favor that both kids and adults will love, creating a fun shared experience for all generations.

EASY TO USE: Our user-friendly design makes these yo-yos suitable for both beginners and experienced yo-yo enthusiasts, providing an engaging and entertaining activity for everyone at your party or event.

IDEAL PARTY BAG FILLERS: This 4ct pack of vibrant plastic yo-yo favors makes for the perfect addition to party favor bags, giveaways, or prizes, ensuring your guests leave with a memorable and entertaining keepsake from your event.
description: Product Description Bring some classic fun to favor bags at any birthday party with these Yo-Yo Party Favors. Easy to learn, yet hard to master, these yo-yos come in various colors with a fun pinwheel swirl sticker accent. One pack of 4 yo-yos. Each measures approx. 1.5 inches. Pop them into stockings at Christmas or even an Easter basket for some unexpected old-fashioned fun. Box Contains 1 x Plastic Yo-Yo Party Bag Fillers
